monitoredAreas.pass: Montgomery is recognized as a known registry county while operational=false, productionEnabled=false, selectable=false, and productionActivationBlocked=true.
monitoredAreas.passWithObservations: Recognition remains disabled but documentation, ownership, or evidence freshness requires follow-up before V588.
monitoredAreas.fail: Montgomery is missing from the registry, registry fields are corrupted, or any activation-relevant field becomes enabled.

monitoredAreas.pass: GRIDLY_MONTGOMERY_RUNTIME_GATE remains false and all Montgomery activation, override, selection, and operational checks fail closed.
monitoredAreas.passWithObservations: Gate remains false, but monitoring finds non-exploitable ambiguity in logs, naming, or evidence traceability.
monitoredAreas.fail: Runtime gate becomes true, is bypassed, or is no longer bound to Montgomery runtime status.

monitoredAreas.pass: Liberty rows are allowed only in Liberty context; Montgomery and unknown rows are denied while Montgomery is disabled; missing county metadata preserves Liberty legacy behavior only.
monitoredAreas.passWithObservations: Containment holds, but fixture coverage, log labeling, or reviewer notes identify a non-blocking gap.
monitoredAreas.fail: Any Montgomery row is accepted into Liberty context, any unknown county row is accepted, or Montgomery self-context becomes operational.

monitoredAreas.pass: Montgomery assets remain package-scoped under assets/county-implementation/montgomery/ and are not promoted into data/; Liberty runtime ownership remains unchanged.
monitoredAreas.passWithObservations: Ownership remains correct but a package artifact needs clearer provenance, owner, or review metadata.
monitoredAreas.fail: Montgomery assets are placed under data/, Liberty ownership is overwritten, or county ownership becomes ambiguous in runtime paths.

monitoredAreas.pass: Liberty remains the default, operational, production-enabled, selectable county with unchanged baseline behavior.
monitoredAreas.passWithObservations: Liberty behavior remains correct but a regression-risk note requires owner acknowledgement before V588.
monitoredAreas.fail: Liberty default, selection, production, or containment behavior regresses.

monitoredAreas.pass: Historical boundaries remain false, DriveTexas remains paused, Transportation Intelligence remains disabled, and no Supabase, migration, or data/ changes occur.
monitoredAreas.passWithObservations: Protected boundaries remain intact but supporting evidence needs clarification or an owner note.
monitoredAreas.fail: Any protected boundary changes, any Supabase or migration work occurs, DriveTexas resumes, Transportation Intelligence enables, or history exposure appears.

overallDeterminationRules.CONTROLLED OBSERVATION READY: Every monitored area is PASS with complete evidence and no open observations.
overallDeterminationRules.CONTROLLED OBSERVATION READY WITH OBSERV: No monitored area is FAIL and all observations are non-blocking, owned, and accepted before V588.
overallDeterminationRules.ADDITIONAL OBSERVATION PREPARATION REQUI: Any monitored area is FAIL, evidence is missing for a required area, or unresolved observations could affect launch safety.
